reference: Hi, I injured my knee six weeks ago playing football. It has been diagnosed as a cruciate injury, and I am waiting for a scan. The knee is still slightly swollen and does not seem to be improving. I am icing and massaging it. Is there anything else I can do to improve the situation? I am forty-four years old, weigh ten stone, and am fairly fit. Thank you.
text: Hi, I injured my knee six weeks ago playing football, and has been diagnosed as a cruciate injury, and I am waiting for a scan. The knee is still slightly swollen and does not seem to be improving. I am icing and massaging it. Is there anything else I can do to improve the situation? I am forty-four years old, very toned, and am fairly fit. Thank you.
